notes: 2024 Ranger IS a spellcaster from level 1 (Spellcasting: 2 prepared spells, 2 first-level slots, Wisdom-based). Favored Enemy grants Hunter's Mark always prepared (does not count toward the 2). Chose Cure Wounds + Ensnaring Strike as the 2 prepared. Ranger gets NO fighting style at level 1 (Fighting Style is a level-2 feature), so fightingStyle is null. Wood Elf lineage: Speed 35, Druidcraft cantrip (L1), Longstrider (L3), Pass Without Trace (L5); Keen Senses gives 1 skill (perception). Applied Soldier background ASI +2 DEX / +1 CON (DEX 15->17, CON 13->14). AC = studded leather 12 + DEX(+3) = 15. HP = 10 + CON(+2) = 12. LOW CONFIDENCE on whether Wood Elf grants Druidcraft at L1 and on exact prepared-spell/ASI details from memory.
